scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun test && bun run build
scripts.format: oxfmt src docs data/cats AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md GEMINI.md CONTEXT.md PRODUCT.md README.md components.json index.html package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src docs data/cats AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md GEMINI.md CONTEXT.md PRODUCT.md README.md components.json index.html package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts
